title: Infernal Skyblock
description: A unique spin on skyblock where you start in the nether instead of the overworld!
body:
### Join our [discord](https://discord.com/invite/VFnHmXzNrm) to report bugs and make suggestions.

## About

This unique spin on the classic skyblock game mode throws you into the nether at the start. Farm nether fungus for wood and bone meal to keep the cycle going. Farm gold and barter your way back to the overworld. Once in the over world, you may locate the end portal and defeat the ender dragon.

## Changes

### Smithing templates

Smithing templates have also been modified because of the changes in structure generation.

- Coast armor trims are a rare drop from drowned
- Dune armor trims are a rare drop from husks
- Eye armor trims can be found in end cities
- Wild armor trims can be found as fishing treasure in jungles
- Host armor trims can be found as fishing treasure
- Raiser armor trims can be found as fishing treasure
- Shaper armor trims can be found as fishing treasure
- Wayfinder armor trims can be found as fishing treasure

### Pottery Sherds

Pottery Sherds can now be found as fishing junk
